channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY рЯ™Ъ Building my own container house вЪТпЄП Owner Builder Learning as I go рЯТ™

item.title: ItвАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceвА¶ I decided to do my own house fo...
item.description:
ItвАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceвА¶ I decided to do my own house foundations рЯП† As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. вЪТпЄП However with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. рЯ§ЈвАНвЩАпЄП But wow itвАЩs been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming вМЫпЄП This is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasnвАЩt until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more вАШdo-ableвАЩ рЯЪЬ The majority of the six weeks that IвАЩve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. рЯЩЛ WhatвАЩs your opinion? вђЗпЄП Do you think itвАЩs worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though itвАЩs taking 2-3x the amount of time? рЯ§ЈвАНвЩАпЄП
#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: рЯЫ†пЄПрЯП†How I started my container home build journey рЯП†рЯЫ...
item.description:
рЯЫ†пЄПрЯП†How I started my container home build journey рЯП†рЯЫ†пЄП The vision wasnвАЩt always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.рЯТ™ Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. рЯІН I believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we donвАЩt see reality as it is, we see it as we are рЯСА This is your life, your reality and the key word here is вАШyouвАЩ! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? вЬ®рЯЂґ
#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: IвАЩm making my container house bigger! рЯП† When designing my c...
item.description:
IвАЩm making my container house bigger! рЯП† When designing my container house I knew it was going to be SMALL so I tried to add elements to make it feel bigger like the over 160sqm of deck I built and now these built out sections IвАЩm fabricating myself. Which will be a wardrobe and dumbwaiter!
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: So yeah pretty straight forward task all in all рЯЩДрЯШВ Wow ins...
item.description:
So yeah pretty straight forward task all in all рЯЩДрЯШВ Wow installing those round posts tested me , but then I remembered rope and physics existed and it was all systems a go! Eight beautiful timber posts now successfully installed in my container house and itвАЩs only going to transform more from here рЯШНрЯ§М
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: IвАЩve been waiting for this day for a long time рЯШН Installing...
item.description:
IвАЩve been waiting for this day for a long time рЯШН Installing all the beautiful timber marri posts that I milled and processed myself from logs to these absolute master pieces has been one of the most rewarding moments IвАЩve had on this build!

item.title: 2 down and 6 more to go, but woah these timber posts are transfo...
item.description:
2 down and 6 more to go, but woah these timber posts are transforming my container house рЯШН
